markdownRemark.html:
Dealing with Node.js versions

  • Using nvm

    • nvm install [###version###]
    • nvm use [###version###]
    • Use nvm ls to find which versions are available
    • Set default with nvm alias default [###version###]

When Dealing with Annoying package errors

  • Using npm (node package manager)

    • npm rebuild
    • npm install
